dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6260 IH: Keeping Violent Offenders Off Our Streets Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fitzgerald (for himself, Mr. Roy, Mr. Wied, and Mr. Steil) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 18, United States Code, to prohibit fraud in connection with posting bail.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Keeping Violent Offenders Off Our Streets Act.

section.header: Fraud in connection with posting bail
section.text: Section 1033(f)(1)(A) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting before the comma the following: (including the posting of monetary bail, criminal bail bonds, and Federal immigration bail bonds).
